basic_details.job_title: IIT ISM Dhanbad PhD. Fellowship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad
basic_details.short_information: Candidates who have a Master’s Degree in relevant fields with UGC/CSIR-NET qualification are eligible to apply for these PhD. Fellowship vacancies. The application process for IIT ISM Dhanbad PhD. Fellowship Recruitment 2026 is being conducted via email and will remain open until 10 May 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in any field (Science, Technology, Engineering, Law, Management, Humanities and Social Sciences)
qualification.details: Master's Degree in any field (Science, Technology, Engineering, Law, Management, Humanities and Social Sciences, Languages and Literature, Arts and Culture, or other related fields) from a UGC recognized University or AICTE approved with a minimum first class in UG and PG. UGC/CSIR-NET (JRF /Assistant Professor/PhD only.)

selection_process: Concept Note Submission and Evaluation Shortlisting Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT ISM Dhanbad PhD. Fellowship Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT ISM Dhanbad PhD. Fellowship?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 10th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for this fellowship?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in any field with a minimum first-class in both UG and PG, along with a UGC/CSIR-NET qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the PhD. Fellowship?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend ranging from Rs. 28,000 to Rs. 37,000.

faq.question: Q4. How will the candidates be selected for the PhD. Fellowship?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the submission and evaluation of a concept note, followed by shortlisting and an online interview.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this PhD. Fellowship.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the PhD. Fellowship post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this position?
faq.answer: The application needs to be submitted via email to the address specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad (IIT ISM Dhanbad).

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this fellowship?
faq.answer: The job type for this PhD. Fellowship is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The link to download the official notification PDF can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article.
